product_results.title: LUCKY STEP Women's Platform Canvas Sneaker Casual Lace-up Stylish Tennis Running Retro Classic Trainers Walking Fashion Sneakers

summary.text: Customers find these shoes super comfortable, noting that feet won't hurt from long standing or walking. They describe the shoes as very stylish and trendy in appearance. The quality receives positive feedback, with customers calling them good shoes and expressing appreciation for the quality. However, customers have mixed opinions about the fit.

authors_reviews.title: Looks amazing, very comfortable for all day use, standing/walking
authors_reviews.text: I've become such a fan of this brand. They are comfortable, fit true to size, are well made, and unique. I'm on my feet all day but have to be fashionable in my job. This brand hits the mark. I have 2 pairs/styles sp far and a few in my cart for future purchases.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.text: My second pair! I’m a true size 8 women’s and they fit perfectly. They are very comfy!!!
